title: In the conditions of the enemy's numerical advantage, the question of...

description: In the conditions of the enemy's numerical advantage, the question of quality training of our soldiers is one of the key ones. It is the effectiveness of practical training, constant training and their compliance with modern conditions of war that depend on the successful performance of combat tasks, the confidence of a soldier in his own actions, and most importantly, the preservation of the lives of our servicemen. At the same time, it is extremely important that the preparation does not...

description_uk: В умовах кількісної переваги противника питання якісної підготовки наших воїнів одне із ключових. Саме від ефективності практичного навчання, постійних тренувань та їхньої відповідності сучасним умовам війни залежить успішне виконання бойових завдань, впевненість воїна у власних діях і найголовніше — збереження життя наших військовослужбовців. title: Missile attack
description: Fedorov stated that Ukraine already has an analogue of the Taurus missile "If we are talking about the Taurus, then of course we now have missiles that operate at a similar and greater distance," the Minister of Defense noted at a briefing with his German colleague Boris Pistorius in Kyiv. He also added that Ukraine is gaining independence in terms of means of strikes: "We have all seen strikes on the Russian Federation at a distance of 1,500 km. And therefore...
description_en: Fedorov stated that Ukraine already has an analogue of the Taurus missile "If we are talking about the Taurus, then of course we now have missiles that operate at a similar and greater distance," the Minister of Defense noted at a briefing with his German colleague Boris Pistorius in Kyiv. description_uk: Федоров заявил, что у Украины уже есть аналог ракет Taurus «Если говорить о Taurus, то конечно, у нас сейчас уже есть ракеты, которые работают на дистанции схожей и больше», — отметил Министр обороны на брифинге с немецким коллегой Борисом Писториусом в Киеве. Также он добавил, что Украина получает независимость в плане средств ударов по рашке: «Мы все видели удары по рф на 1500 км. И поэтому...

title: 🤝Ukraine and Germany are launching joint production of long-range...
title_en: 🤝Ukraine and Germany are launching joint production of long-range...
title_uk: 🤝Україна та Німеччина запускають спільне виробництво далекобійних...
description: 🤝Ukraine and Germany are launching joint production of long-range drones with a radius of up to 1,500 km. This was announced by Boris Pistorius during his visit to Kyiv. In addition, the countries signed a letter of intent to launch Brave Germany — a joint program to develop defense technologies and support innovative startups.
description_en: 🤝Ukraine and Germany are launching joint production of long-range drones with a radius of up to 1,500 km. This was announced by Boris Pistorius during his visit to Kyiv. In addition, the countries signed a letter of intent to launch Brave Germany — a joint program to develop defense technologies and support innovative startups.
description_uk: 🤝Украина и Германия запускают совместное производство дальнобойных дронов с радиусом до 1500 км Об этом сообщил Борис Писториус во время визита в Киев. Кроме того, страны подписали письмо о намерениях по запуску Brave Germany — совместной программы по развитию оборонных технологий и поддержке инновационных стартапов.

title: Kyiv: UK sanctions Russia over deportation of Ukrainian children, Armenian...

description: UK sanctions Russia over deportation of Ukrainian children, Armenian election meddling. The British government called the package one of its “toughest measures” to date, targeting individuals and institutions involved in the indoctrination and militarization of Ukrainian children.
description_en: UK sanctions Russia over deportation of Ukrainian children, Armenian election meddling. The British government called the package one of its “toughest measures” to date, targeting individuals and institutions involved in the indoctrination and militarization of Ukrainian children.

description: EU backs Ukraine war compensation, funds from Russian frozen assets up for debate. Canada is also expected to sign the convention establishing the International Claims Commission during a visit to Brussels on May 11, which would make it the first non-European country to do so.

title: Casualties reported
description: Tactical medicine is knowledge that saves lives in war. Scouts of the 92nd OShBr are constantly improving their skills in providing aid to themselves and their wounded comrades in combat conditions. During the training, soldiers practice applying tourniquets, evacuating the wounded, stopping critical bleeding, working under stress and under enemy fire. In modern warfare, every fighter must be ready not only...
description_en: Tactical medicine is knowledge that saves lives in war. Scouts of the 92nd OShBr are constantly improving their skills in providing aid to themselves and their wounded comrades in combat conditions. During the training, soldiers practice applying tourniquets, evacuating the wounded, stopping critical bleeding, working under stress and under enemy fire. In modern warfare, every fighter must be ready not only...
description_uk: Тактична медицина — це знання, які на війні рятують життя. Розвідники 92 ОШБр постійно вдосконалюють навички надання допомоги собі і пораненим побратимам у бойових умовах. Під час занять воїни відпрацьовують накладання турнікетів, евакуацію поранених, зупинку критичних кровотеч, роботу в умовах стресу та під вогневим впливом противника. У сучасній війні кожен боєць має бути готовим не лише...

title: Energy infrastructure hit
description: After the winter strikes on energy, the Russians turned their attention to the Ukrainian defense sector, — RBC-Ukraine According to the publication's sources, the Russian military leadership suddenly realized that Ukraine had significantly increased the production of weapons, in particular drones. Tuapse passed, right? Now among the priority targets of the Russian Federation are enterprises of the defense-industrial complex, gas and oil production facilities, and...

description_uk: После зимних ударов по энергетике россияне переключили внимание на украинский оборонный сектор, — РБК-Украина По данным источников издания, в российском военном руководстве вдруг поняли, что Украина существенно нарастила производство оружия, в частности дронов. Туапсе сдал, да? Теперь среди приоритетных целей рф — предприятия оборонно-промышленного комплекса, газо- и нефтедобывающие объекты, а...

title: There will be no TCC anymore: the Ministry of Defense will turn them...
title_en: There will be no TCC anymore: the Ministry of Defense will turn them...
title_uk: ТЦК більше не буде: Міноборони зверне їх...
description: There will be no TCC anymore: the Ministry of Defense will turn them into "Reserve Offices+", and part of the functions will be transferred to the police and recruiting centers. It is assumed that the new structures will be divided into two directions: ▪️offices of kompletovaniya — for accounting, recruiting and registration for service; ▪️ escort offices — for payments, certificates and social support of military personnel and their families....
description_en: There will be no TCC anymore: the Ministry of Defense will turn them into "Reserve Offices+", and part of the functions will be transferred to the police and recruiting centers. It is assumed that the new structures will be divided into two directions: ▪️offices of kompletovaniya — for accounting, recruiting and registration for service; ▪️ escort offices — for payments, certificates and social support of military personnel and their families....
description_uk: ТЦК больше не будет: Минобороны превратит их в «Офисы резерва+», а часть функций передадут полиции и рекрутинговым центрам Об этом со ссылкой на источники пишет УП. Предполагается, что новые структуры будут разделены на два направления: ▪️офисы комплектования — для учета, рекрутинга и оформления на службу; ▪️офисы сопровождения — для выплат, справок и социальной поддержки военных и их семей....

description: Wanted former Polish minister flees Hungary as Magyar takes power. Wanted former Polish Justice Minister Zbigniew Ziobro fled Hungary after newly sworn-in Prime Minister Peter Magyar said he would extradite him to Poland, Ziobro told Polish outlet TV Republika on May 10.
description_en: Wanted former Polish minister flees Hungary as Magyar takes power. Wanted former Polish Justice Minister Zbigniew Ziobro fled Hungary after newly sworn-in Prime Minister Peter Magyar said he would extradite him to Poland, Ziobro told Polish outlet TV Republika on May 10.
description_uk: Wanted former Polish minister flees Hungary as Magyar takes power. Wanted former Polish Justice Minister Zbigniew Ziobro fled Hungary after newly sworn-in Prime Minister Peter Magyar said he would extradite him to Poland, Ziobro told Polish outlet TV Republika on May 10.

I confirmed Ukraine's readiness to work together with countries...

I confirmed Ukraine's readiness to work together with countries...
description_uk: 📞 Міністр закордонних справ України Андрій Сибіга провів телефонні переговори з міністеркою закордонних справ Латвії Байбою Браже щодо нещодавніх інцидентів з дронами в Латвії: "Розслідування довели, що вони стали результатом навмисного відхилення українських дронів російськими засобами радіоелектронної боротьби від їхніх цілей у Росії. Я підтвердив готовність України працювати разом з країнами...

title: Today is Mother's Day. And especially today I want to say the most...
title_en: Today is Mother's Day. And especially today I want to say the most...
title_uk: Сьогодні день матері. І особливо сьогодні я хочу сказати найбільше...
description: Today is Mother's Day. And especially today I want to say the most important word - thank you. Thank you for absolute love, which certainly knows no bounds, and for everything a mother does for her child and family. The conditions of the war changed the lives of millions of Ukrainian families. And Ukrainian mothers today are about incredible endurance, courage, bravery and love, which helps to persevere. Thank you to every mother for life, for believing in your...
description_en: Today is Mother's Day. And especially today I want to say the most important word - thank you. Thank you for absolute love, which certainly knows no bounds, and for everything a mother does for her child and family. The conditions of the war changed the lives of millions of Ukrainian families. And Ukrainian mothers today are about incredible endurance, courage, bravery and love, which helps to persevere. Thank you to every mother for life, for believing in your...
description_uk: Сьогодні День матері. І особливо сьогодні хочеться сказати найважливіше слово – дякую. Дякуємо за абсолютну любов, яка точно не знає меж, і за все, що мама робить для дитини й родини. Умови війни змінили життя мільйонів українських родин. І українські мами сьогодні – це про неймовірну витримку, сміливість, хоробрість і любов, яка допомагає вистояти. Дякую кожній мамі за життя, за віру у своїх...
